data.title: Climatebase, SF Climate Week, Oaklandish, and Blue & Yellow Launch First-Ever Official SF Climate Week Merchandise Collection
data.description: An exclusive partnership has been formed to combine sustainability, Bay Area design, and community pride. On April 12, 2026, SF Climate Week, Climatebase, Oaklandish, and Blue & Yellow revealed the debut of the initial official SF Climate Week merchandise line. This unique collaboration aims to highlight local environmental initiatives and features limited-edition items designed to promote awareness.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures Loom; Trump To Blockade Strait Of Hormuz After U.S. Iran Talks End
data.description: President Trump has recently declared a U.S. Navy blockade of the Strait of Hormuz following unsuccessful U.S.-Iran talks, leading to concerns about the future of Dow Jones futures. This decision comes after negotiations between the two countries failed to reach a resolution. The potential impact of this blockade on global markets is significant, with the potential for disruption in the oil trade route causing alarm among investors. The news has already started affecting futures numbers and is being closely monitored by analysts and experts in the financial sector.

data.title: Developers create Qwopus model that mimics Claude Opus 4.6's AI reasoning for easy use on any PC. Close to original.
data.description: A developer has created a local Qwen model called Qwopus, based on the reasoning system of Claude Opus 4.6. Qwopus closely resembles the original model and is accessible for anyone to use.

data.title: Papaya Global and Tech Mahindra Announce Strategic Alliance to Modernize Global Workforce Operations and Payments
data.description: A recent collaboration has emerged between Papaya Global and Tech Mahindra to blend Papaya Global's workforce and payments platform with Tech Mahindra's transformation and managed services skill set. This partnership aims to support enterprises in simplifying payroll, payments, and compliance processes. The announcement was made in New York on April 12, 2026. This collaboration is seen as a strategic move to enhance efficiency and accuracy in workforce management.

data.title: Strategy's Michael Saylor plans Bitcoin purchase after 105 transactions since 2020, using corporate debt and equity financing.
data.description: Since the year 2020, the company has finalized a total of 105 transactions involving Bitcoin. They are adopting a contrarian strategy by persistently increasing their Bitcoin holdings through funding from corporate debts and equity.

data.title: Weekend Round-Up: Bitcoin's Market Fit, Satoshi Nakamoto's Identity And More
data.description: This week in the cryptocurrency world was eventful. Anthony Pompliano shared his optimism about Bitcoin's future, stating it has a solid "true product-market fit" due to increasing interest from traditional finance and geopolitical actors. He highlighted Morgan Stanley's launch of a low-fee Bitcoin exchange-traded fund as a sign of growing institutional adoption. Additionally, reports surfaced of Iran contemplating a transit tax settled in Bitcoin. In another intriguing development, there were speculations about the potential revelation of Satoshi Nakamoto's identity. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.
Scaramucci Cautions Against Bitcoin Anxiety: 'The Asset Didn't Change. The Price Did'

data.title: Dow Jones Futures Loom; Trump Plans To Blockade Hormuz After U.S. Iran Talks End
data.description: President Trump has revealed plans for a U.S. Navy blockade of the Strait of Hormuz following unsuccessful U.S.-Iran talks. This announcement has created uncertainty in the futures market, particularly impacting Dow Jones Futures. With talks between the two nations concluding without an agreement, tensions have escalated. The potential blockade of the strategic waterway raises concerns, as it is a vital passage for global oil shipments. Traders and investors are closely monitoring the situation for further developments that could influence market movements.

data.title: Fan-favorite Easter Jeep® Safari Concept Becomes Reality With Retro-inspired Jeep Wrangler and Gladiator Rewind Special Editions
data.description: A special edition of the 2026 Jeep Wrangler called the Wrangler Rewind has been released, evoking the bold and expressive style of the 80s and 90s. This edition is the sixth of 12 limited-edition models celebrating the brand's Twelve campaign. The unveiling took place in Auburn Hills, Michigan on April 12, 2026. This marks the halfway point in the release of the special edition Wrangler models. The Wrangler Rewind showcases a vibrant design inspired by the iconic fashion and aesthetics of the past decades, appealing to those nostalgic for that era.

data.title: Lerøy Seafood Group ASA: Approved Base Prospectus for Listing of Green Bond
data.description: The Financial Supervisory Authority of Norway (Finanstilsynet) authorized Lerøy Seafood Group ASA to proceed with the listing on Euronext Oslo Børs of its senior unsecured green bond worth NOK 500 million. This approval came on 6 February 2026, and it included the base prospectus and appendices submitted by the Company.

data.title: OROCO ANNOUNCES RESIGNATION OF CEO
data.description: In Vancouver, Canada on March 30, 2026, Oroco Resource Corp. shared that their Chief Executive Officer and director, Richard Lock, will be stepping down due to personal reasons on April 30, 2026. Oroco Resource Corp. is listed on the TSX-V as OCO and on the OTC as ORRCF.

data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, XRP Gain 1% Ahead Of Inflation Data Release
data.description: Bitcoin's value remains steady amidst mixed sentiment, balancing positive outlook with institutional selling linked to global uncertainties such as the U.S.-Iran tensions. Tomorrow's release of U.S. CPI data is anticipated. Current cryptocurrency prices are as follows: Bitcoin at $72,123, Ethereum at $2,218, Solana at $83.92, XRP at $1.35, Dogecoin at $0.09337, and Shiba Inu at $0.005978. Recent market data reveals that 98,516 traders were liquidated in the last day, totaling $306.60 million in losses. Spot Bitcoin ETFs saw net outflows of $124.6 million, while Ethereum ETFs experienced outflows of $18.6 million. More information is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Anthropic, OpenAI's Next Models Could Be A 'Watershed' Event For Cybersecurity, Warns Expert—'Agentic Attackers Are Coming'
data.description: Cybersecurity experts are sounding the alarm about the increasing risks posed by AI agents, as they can detect and exploit system weaknesses more rapidly and persistently compared to human hackers. Shlomo Kramer, CEO of Cato Networks, emphasized the emergence of "agent attackers" which marks a significant shift in cybersecurity history. The use of AI has the potential to magnify current vulnerabilities and hasten the development of new software exploits. Kramer highlighted the continuous evolution of AI models such as Mythos, OpenAI, and Gemini from Alphabet, along with upcoming Chinese open-source models, indicating a looming wave of sophisticated cybersecurity threats. The industry is on high alert as these advancements trigger concerns over cybersecurity implications.
Update from RCI Banque on the 1st Supplement to the 2025 Base Prospectus for EMTN has been released. #Finances #Investing

data.title: Retail Investors Increased Use of Defensive Options Strategies Ahead of Iran Conflict, Data Highlights
data.description: According to data from Investa, retail investors in the UK significantly raised their purchases of defensive put options in anticipation of geopolitical tensions. The increase in these protective options suggests a growing concern among investors, with a noticeable uptick in the number of put options bought. This cautious approach indicates a shift in sentiment towards more defensive strategies in the face of uncertain geopolitical events.
Trade the Moon: Firefly, Rocket Lab and More Stocks Poised for NASA's Artemis Launch

data.title: Nasus Pharma Advances NS002 Towards Pivotal Study Following Positive Phase 2; Reports Annual Results and Provides Business Update
data.description: The latest Phase 2 results show that NS002 may excel in delivering epinephrine, with notable enhancements in early absorption compared to EpiPen®. These improvements were statistically significant. A pivotal study is scheduled for the fourth quarter of 2026.

data.title: Silexion Therapeutics Receives Approval from Israeli Ministry of Health to Initiate Phase 2/3 Clinical Trial of SIL204 in Locally Advanced Pancreatic Cancer
data.description: A major regulatory accomplishment has been achieved, signifying progress into clinical-stage development of a groundbreaking RNA interference therapy. This therapy utilizes a novel systemic treatment delivery method and focuses on addressing the prevalent issue of KRAS-driven cancers, which currently lack effective treatment options. This advancement marks a crucial step in addressing the pressing medical needs of a considerable number of patients.

data.title: Worth Raises $30 Million in Series A Funding to Fuel Record Growth
data.description: Worth's AI-powered platform for SMB onboarding and underwriting in financial institutions received investments from Fulcrum Equity Partners, Amex Ventures, and TTV Capital. This funding infusion is set to boost the advancement of AI-driven processes, revolutionizing the future of SMB operations in financial institutions. The specific amounts of the investments were not disclosed.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures, Oil Prices Loom After U.S.-Iran Talks End With No Deal
data.description: Following extended negotiations between the United States and Iran, an agreement was not reached, leading to uncertainty in the futures market. Vice President JD Vance mentioned that Tehran declined to agree to the terms proposed by the U.S. The Dow Jones Futures and oil prices are now facing an uncertain future following the conclusion of the talks without a deal.
